scripts.db:up: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:down: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml stop postgres redis
scripts.db:logs: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f postgres redis
scripts.db:reset: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis
scripts.db:psql: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml exec postgres psql -U postgres -d ptas168_dev
scripts.compose:tunnel: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml --profile tunnel up -d cloudflared
scripts.compose:tunnel:url: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml logs cloudflared | grep -oE 'https://[a-z0-9-]+\.trycloudflare\.com' | tail -1
scripts.compose:tunnel:down: docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml stop cloudflared && docker compose --env-file .env -f infrastructure/docker/docker-compose.yml rm -f cloudflared
